name: Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
3. Blend in fruit spread, butter, and vanilla.
4. Add flour, oats, baking powder, salt, and spices; mix well.
5. Spread dough into a greased 12" x 8-inch baking dish.
6. Bake for 18 minutes, until golden brown and firm to touch.
7. Cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Cut into 18 bars.
9. Store in a tightly covered container.
